title: Step 4: Confirm that you want to disable IP access list.

bySection.heading: Configure and Enable IP Access List for the Atlas UI

codeBlocks.section: Configure and Enable IP Access List for the Atlas UI
codeBlocks.content:
You don't have permission to view the <url-with-organizationID> in the
Atlas UI. To gain access, ask the organization owner to add your
IP address to the IP access list.
